This is a very interesting game with the frisbee. Listen to me carefully. First we have free teams. In each teams have 3 players. each clear give the frisbee then turns. The winner is the player with a most points.

To play Frisbee howling you have to mark an area about 8 meters X by 3 meters and this area is then the bowling alley. If you don't have bowling pins you can use 10 plastic bottles for it. Line the 'pins' up in rows of 4, then 3, then 2, then 1. each player have two opportunities on each turn to shot with te frisbee. each have ten turns. Every pin that fall down is one point. When the player do a 'strike' he have two more shots. The player with more points is the winner. Be careful, its better don't play on windy days.

Hi Ian What up? As I heard that you want to leave your job because you are not able to adaptive with the new location. due to the reasons that you mentioned I think you may have a claustrophobia which is irrational fear of enclosed spaces. I strongly recommend consulting a specialist since I heard many people had an amazing improvement after having some treatment techniques. At the first place there is a cognitive behavioral therapy CB which trains the patient to think positively and rationally. Also, it provides some methods to deal with symptoms like training to breathe deeply and slowly, muscle relaxation, etc. in addition to CB there is a medication treatment which is based on using drugs to manage symptoms. hopefully my message helps you and we see you soon in our job. with love, Nouma

Terms of reference - general employee satisfaction within the company. procedure A survey was prepared and conducted across a representative cross-section of employees, which totalled 120, 10% of the company. The topics included satisfaction with: 1. employee basic package 2. working environment 3. Company structure findings employee basic package: - the majority of employees were satisfied with paying scales: vacation days and sick days - many employees complained about overtime culture of the company, they didn't get anything back for that. working environment: - mainly happy - there's no appraisal system Company structure: - two years to get advanced package is too long - the lines of reporting are too long conclusions: - appraisal system must be improved. - the management style is too autocratic recommendations: - to make days off for working extra hours - 18 month to become eligible for the advanced package - restructure of the company

Sales figure for best books company: - National sales figure: Between 2004 and 2005 there's a sharp increase in the sales, reaching almost 1 million sales. Between 2005 and 2006 sales figures keeper steady at 1 million. Between 2006 and 2007 sales increased sharply to almost 3 million, but just after that it decreased dramatically to around 1.5 million. - International sales figure: In 2004 until the middle of the year, sales increased dramatically, followed by another sharp increase in 2005 reaching more than 2 million sales. In the middle of 2005 sales figures dropped considerably staying at around 1 million and it kept around the 1 million mark until 2007, where it dropped a bit more to around 0.5 million and stayed there in 2008 as well.

International Sales figures: International book sales fluctuated between 2004 to 2008. 2004 to 2005: a dramatic rise to a figure of 2 million. 2005 book sales fell sharply to about 1 million. In 2007 there was a sharp decrease in sales of about half a million. Sales have levelled off at this figure. National Sales figures: The trend is one of fluctuation. 2004 to 2005 book sales rose sharply to 1 million. 2005 to 2006 sales levelled off at 1 million. 2006 to 2007 sales increased to around 3 million.

This article aims at people who need help in transferring to a more gratifying job. The author provides the reader with a two-step strategy enabling him to achieve his dream job. The theory developed in the excerpt is based on statistics and scientific research to demonstrate that people's work discontentment finds an answer in the wrong former motivations of their first job choice. according to the author, the combination of personality traits and life interests would be the magic formula to find the ideal profession. The question is: Can magic really work in the real life? Although this theory sounds like a promise of happiness in this world of complaints and disillusions, I think the most difficult part will be to find "the job" which match the best the two factors. I can't help but feel that despite its uplifting outcome, the solution offered by the article isn't realistically conceivable.%%

The advancement of technology is unstoppable. It has changed my all life. I am an enthusiastic fan who is on technology. First of all, I like to buy new product. I have bought every generation pad, that from the first generation to the newest, and there are many e-waste in my house, especially charger, so many kinds of it. Then I have to work 7*24, every day and every night. My boss assigned work every time. May be you were dreaming. And then, we build more computers to hold information, to produce more copies, but have less remember, and communication occurs less in face-to-face. You can see everybody and I that were looking on the smartphone without talking anybody, even our lover or coworker. finally, I am totally dependent on smartphone., we'd be lost without it. We are completely engrossed in our smartphone. We are in a difficult position. I like each other, but I need smartphone. Someone told me he could have without wife but wife. In a word, technology is a double-edged sword. It has advantages and disadvantages.

I would like to write some words about a ballet. The ballet is a performing art that is unique to my city. I live in St Petersburg. It is an old city founded in 1703. St Petersburg has got a very old ballet history. The casanova wallet Academy was founded in 1737. It became first Russia's educational establishment providing professional ballet training. Over the years, The wallet Academy has graduated a lot of legendary dancer and choreographers including Anna Pavlova, Rudolf Nureyev, George Balanchine, Mikhail Baryshnikov. There are three significant ballet theaters in St Petersburg: Mariinskiy theater, Mikhailovskiy theater and Aleksandrovsk theater. All of that theaters have got old traditions and rich history. I have to notice that I don't like a ballet as an art. However, I visit some ballet performances in my city per year because it's history of my city and I am proud it.

physiological: I don't have anything to complain about this category. I always have good food, drink and a place to rest my body after a hard working day. safety and security: I live in a small city. Here, everybody knows each other and the crime rate is very low. I and my family feel safe to live here. Love and affection: I'm married, I love my wife and I feel loved indeed. I also have a son, he's the most precious thing I possess. When he smiles at me, I feel strong and renewed to start another hard working and studying day. esteem: I always study hard and I like to be the guy, it doesn't matter what I do and where I am. It's very pleasant to me when a person makes me a compliment, it fulfills my ego and self-esteem. It's important to feel like that. Self-actualization: Having all the topics above fulfilled, I can say that I'm a actualized person. I always do things to keep this self-actualization. People only can be happy if they feel self-actualized.

Dear Sir, I have some ideas about a new advertising campaign for your products. The three pictures could express the Century's image of classic. In fact on this picture we see a star under the light. All the people around the star have only eyes for her. We could be affirmative that they are all fan of this woman. The woman isn't disturb by these attitudes. She controls the situation. An other thing is the timeless aspect of this picture as this should always existed. A star is in our collective imagination. With this picture and the slogan "Your glamour;your Century" on a TV and billboards campaign we can give these positive images of your business. I hope see you again. Best regards Bob Sinclair

Our recent research indicates that on the one hand our key consumers should be the second demographic group because 18 to 24-year-old men are 18% more than 15 to 19-year-old women, but on the other hand the number of the male population will dramatically drop until 2025, whereas the number of female population will rise sharply and will have reached 30 million by 2025. Our marketing department should project a new magazine supported by extensive website content because both men and women prefer such magazines with advanced technologies. futhermore, the purchasing power of men is 89 billion more than women's, but it will rise insignificantly (from $242 to $244 billion), in comparison, the women's purchasing power will jump up extremely (from $153 to $175 billion). As for the competitive products, we should take into account that there are 6 women's magazines that already exist, in contrast, there are 1 long term and 2 recent products for men. To sum up, we should estimate all advantages and disadvantages and investigate the economic situation in both groups properly to come to the right decision.

title: riding Genie: actual drama Setting: Fukushima nuclear plant and TECO, Tokyo Characters: Ken Watanabe (Manager of Fukushima nuclear Power plant), Kuki (Ken's wife), Sun Ori (stuff of the Power plant), Baku wada (President) storyline: After mega earthquake and tsunami attacked East-Japan, Fukushima nuclear power plant was damaged fatally. The manager of plant, Watanabe tried to stop the meltdown and fight with the head quarter, scholars those who care about only reputation and even the prime minister of Japan. After many struggles, they understand that the only way left is someone enter the factor core and open the bulb by hands in the middle of radioactivity. He organizes 'Old boy team' (60 years old or more) as a death-defying corps. They and their families episodes are also described in detail. Executive producer: Shinichiro Kadoka Director: Takeshi titano Other stuff: screen writer, illustrator for storyboard, location director We need very good gaffer because the tsunami and factory scene is important. Also we will hire the stunt performer for the reproducibility scene.

Green business is very important to the world. Whenever possible, I look for environmentally friendly product but, unfortunately, there are very few available and in most cases more expensive than others. I think that even truly green companies take advantage to profit more. In Brazil, some kinds if products are environmentally friendly: all dish detergent, all washing powder (theyre biodegradable), all toilet paper, all towel paper (theyre made from reforested wood) and its not more expensive. On the other hand, other products is very expensive like: organics vegetables, biodegradable bags, solar panels, ecological leather... sometimes, I think companies explore our concern about the environment, because I dont understand why the most of these products are so expensive. I guess to encourage consumption, theyre should be the same price than others. I dont believe that companies spend much more to do this environmentally friendly products. Im very sad about this situation. Is still far from a true raise awareness of all companies to the problem of the environment.

Learning another language is not an easy process - different word order, irregular verbs, those tricky prepositions and difficult to pronounce, strange looking vocabulary. There are also many methods on offer to accomplish this feat - so many in fact, that it can become confusing and hard to decide which is the best way for you. courses on cassette, evening classes, private lessons, a language school, move to the country of the target language (an extreme method, perhaps), a correspondence course or a pen friend - the list is endless and it is like a jungle trying to decide what to try.

In my country there isn't a big concern about green products, like there is in developed countries as USA, France, England and so on. actually, here, the major concerns are about organic food and furniture made with wood. About the wood, there is a severe control by authorities to avoid using of wood from natural forests. About food, there are green products here, as well, they use a lot the word "organic" but I have serious doubts about how much organic it's. nowadays, be green or organic became a kind of selling argument due the world scenario of pollution and the search for health improvement. Well, I won't go out of my way to buy green products, I don't bought the idea that is really necessary. In my opinion, the most important for health is do physical exercise everyday, at least half an hour, and eat only enough. For sure, the diet need be balanced with vegetables, proteins and cereals, avoiding white sugar and candies. Another important point is drinking a lot of water, in order to keep migratation. therefore, in my opinion, quality of food is important, but the way of production isn't.%%

On the one hand, the size demographic group 2 will fall sharply by 2025. On the other hand, their purchasing power will rise steadily. In comparison, there will be an increasing purchasing in group 1. However, the two groups will maintain their purchasing power for hight. As you can see, developing a new magazine for either demographic group should be profitable. It's a challenge to define 'green business'. To my opinion, 'green business' is manufacturing the green products. To the extent, both of them are environmentally friendly. Green businesses do their part to conserve natural resources. A green business makes a conscious choice to use materials that are organic, recycled and biodegradable. To be truly green, the businesses has to operate on renewable sources of energy. Some people are motivated to conserve natural resources. Others simply prefer to use environmentally friendly products in their home. I believe it's good to reuse things, it's my way of being environmentally friendly. However, the obsession with green business puts me off. Though, I like green products, I don't go out of my way to buy them. I mean, I would definitely buy that product if is was more environmentally friendly. You know, many of the green products are in too much packaging. Now, I will be more concerned about the green food. The green food is healthier. I will sacrifice other things in my life so I can afford green food. All in all, the above is just my own opinion.

Being located in Paris, the center of Art and culture in the heart of Europe, our big and eclectic Museum is focussed on three different European styles of paintings, two of them have their origin in Paris: Impressionism, Expressionism and Cubism. In the impressionist wing of our museum you find besides other the significant representative of Impressionism a special exhibition of the works of Claude Monet (15.3.-31.5.2013), you will find "The Road Bridge at Argenteuil" among them , a sophisticated study of light and refections. The Expressionist wing portraits the works of the two groups of famous German painters: The Bridge and The blue Rider, the later one represented by a special exhibition with the paintings of Franz Marc (1.6.-30.-7.2013), - but you will find exhibits from Paul Klee and Wassily Kandinsky as well. Our Cubist Wing was inspired by Pablo Picasso and George Braque, with "Le your". Both artists were living in Paris. The geometrical forms they used sho multiple viewpoints of one figure. As highlight of the year a special Braque- exhibit will be shown from October 10 to December 21 this year

In Brazil we have some well-known e-commerce sites, some represents big national retail chains. . normally these sites are very well designed, and offer a large range of goods to buy. Since furniture, appliances, gadgets, clothing, shoes, fashion accessories There is another site of e-commerce widely known and used in Brazil, it's named Mercado Liver (Free Market), where anyone can sell your products, for this is necessary that the seller register yourself in the provider. After approval, the seller is allowed to offer their products, brand new or used, on the site. For every product sold, the seller pays a small fee to the site. The buyer has some different ways for payments, credit cards, bank slip, direct bank transfer, and other way, where the payment is made to an entity such as PayPal. The payment is only released to the seller after the goods are received, and buyer informed to the site that it's OK. The site has another good facility for the buyer: the sellers ranking. Which are shown how many products have been sold, and in percentage, how was the approval of buyers for each seller. The buyer can use this ranking for choosing the seller.%%

corporate social responsibility today is one of the most wide-spreaded streams among companies all over the world. It stands for good purposes: every prosperous company that take care of its image should make something for society. wounds good at least. But does it really works? Is it the best solution for companies to donate their money for charity for example. If we speak about shareholders, it can be even irrational to waste the money in such a way. actually it can be even worse for society. imagine that a company spend a lot of money on social projects. To cover the cost it increase the price of its own goods and finally become a bankrupt, because of large sum squandered. In this case the will be a lot of people damaged: workers, clients, even whole economic. What I want to say, speaking about CSR managers must think about the company's profit, they should invest in adjacent spheres: improve conditions of their workers, increase the local infrastructure... All these actions can finally lead to better quality of the products and that will be a win-win situation. Do not follow the trend and spend money on unprofitable projects, spend extra money wisely.%%

describing whom I admire about traits and habits of a successful person in general terms are visionary, bold, and innovative, has good communications skills, and has empathy and respect human values. It seldom we find people that have visionary personality, they have vision about future and foresee what is necessary to supply it. I know who has this quality, he is very competent and he has goals. His act in scientific area developing products to be better human health, especially skin health. Now hes working with his team in the international respected and worthy company at south of the country, developing products based in human DNA achieving more efficient results. When he participate in the European international trade fair for cosmetics, if somebody need something does not exists until moment, and he using his skills catch what the costumers need. Coming back to Brazil, he immediately start develop the new product sought. Another traits like as good communications skills, and empathy and respect human values it is inherent to him.

I think, there are several traits for these kind of people, all these traits are important, like discipline, hard work, intelligence, honesty and over all, they see the challenges like opportunities to take, and if we are speaking about academic way, they never let their goals without finish, in the business way, they take care in all details of their works programs and in their family way, they give a great value of the family relationship. Some time, we believe that the success it is linked with the economic capacity of the people, but this is not necessary, there are so many aspect to evaluate, just to say that some one is a success man, many time the success of any people is in their goals, the capacity they have to help others, the capacity to gain the admiration and love from other persons, because of philanthropy, charity or simply the way they treat to others.

The city where I live is full of buildings. Its a coastal city located in the south of Brazil. The city is well-known by its landscape and because of its buildings. The architecture is very modern and there are a lot of tall and beautiful buildings. The buildings structures are very attractive and always get the tourists attention. The buildings' designs have a lot of mirrors and unusual forms, like triangles and circles. One particular building that I always been fascinated is the Alexandria, located in the downtown of the city. The design and the image are amazing and its one of the highest buildings in the city. The old Brazilian architecture is not so attractive, if we compare with some building in China or in the U.S., but recently this area has been evolving a lot and our buildings are gaining identity and prestige due to its bold design and creativity.

I'll tell you about two intriguing building and architecture in Japan. One is the Tokyo sky tree that is the tallest tower in Japan and located in the center of the capital city of Japan. It was built about two years ago, after that it has become one of the most popular sightseeing destinations for tourists both inside and outside of Japan. The height, which is almost 634m,attracts many people, so even now it seems to take long time to take the clever to go to the top of the tower. The other one is the Kyoto J station. It was renovated more than a decade ago from an old fashioned station to a very modernized designed one. First, people living Kyoto didn't like the newly designed station because they thought its newest design didn't match the atmosphere of old, quiet former capital of Kyoto. However, these days it's become popular and people have gotten used to its modern style. actually, when you visit Kyoto, you can enjoy both aspects of Kyoto now.
